basics.name: Jiacan Li
basics.label: Robotics Engineering Student
basics.summary: Undergraduate student majoring in Robotics Engineering at SUSTech. Research interests primarily lie in Reinforcement Learning, Embodied AI, and Autonomous UAV Navigation, with extensive experience in exoskeleton control systems and multimodal human-robot interaction.

location.address: Southern University of Science and Technology

education.institution: Southern University of Science and Technology (SUSTech)

work.name: Stroke Rehabilitation Exoskeletons
work.summary: Designed and developed a lower-limb exoskeleton system specifically tailored for stroke patients’ gait rehabilitation.
highlights: Developed and deployed a deep learning-based gait prediction framework predicting real-time kinematic states.
Patent: Co-inventor of An Exoskeleton Control Method... (Published, Student 5th Author).

work.name: Deep Learning-Based Unified Exoskeleton Control
work.summary: Developed a novel data-driven unified control framework utilizing deep neural networks to forecast human motion intentions.
highlights: Deployed a lightweight model on embedded hardware for real-time inference.
Patent: Co-inventor of Control Method, Device, Electronic Equipment... (Published, Student 2nd Author).

work.name: Human-in-the-Loop Bayesian Optimization
work.summary: Developed a human-in-the-loop Bayesian optimization algorithm to personalize assistive torque profiles in real time based on human metabolic cost.

projects.name: Autonomous Navigation & Inspection System
highlights: Collaborated with the R&D team to develop a multi-sensor fusion pipeline (Depth Camera, LiDAR, IMU) for autonomous navigation in GPS-denied confined spaces.

projects.name: ROS2-Based Mobile Manipulator with Multimodal HRI
projects.summary: Designed a differential mobile chassis equipped with a 3-DOF robotic arm.
highlights: Implemented autonomous mapping and navigation via SLAM Toolbox and Nav2.
Developed an HRI system integrating Vosk and MediaPipe to coordinate and execute complex task sequences.

awards.title: National First Prize (Operation Challenge)
awards.summary: Also won National Second Prize and Two National Third Prizes.

awards.title: National Bronze Award & Provincial Gold Award
awards.awarder: China Int'l College Students Innovation Competition
